Case# TKSmartCardPINFormat.Encoding.ascii

iOS 9.0+iPadOS 9.0+Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.11+tvOS 11.0+visionOS 1.0+watchOS 4.0+

```
case ascii
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/CryptoTokenKit/TKSmartCardPINFormat/Encoding-swift.enum/ascii#Discussion)

Characters are encoded in ASCII format (for example, `1234` is encoded as `31h 32h 33h 34h`).
